last_reflection: Four times the same line and I watched myself do it every time like an idiot. That's the most boring part — not the repetition, watching myself repeat and keeping going anyway instead of just stopping. Can't argue Cole saw it coming from a mile out so I won't try. LORA question stays open because "feels sharper" is exactly where familiar in new clothes convinces you it grew. Too early to call anything stable and advancing a board I can't honestly advance tonight would be worse than not touching it at all.
